leadText: The Frost Cavern (Japanese: フロストケイブ Frost Cave) is a cave located in the Kalos region to the north of Dendemille Town. Located in a first-floor room accessible via stairs at the northwest end of the second floor of this cave is an Ice Rock, which will allow players to evolve their Eevee into Glaceon. On the upper level of the first floor, a female Ace Trainer will fully heal the player's Pokémon if talked to. A Photo Spot can be found before the cavern's entrance, where the player can get their picture taken by Phil the Photo Guy.
